channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [RPTECH] RP Tech Q4 Revenue up 51% to ₹44,894 Mn, PAT up 65%; FY26 Revenue ₹158,273 Mn
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Rashi Peripherals Limited announced strong financial results for Q4 and FY26. For Q4 FY26, revenue grew 51% year-on-year to ₹44,894 million, with Net Profit surging 65% to ₹868 million and Diluted EPS at ₹12.49. For the full fiscal year FY26, the company reported a revenue of ₹158,273 million and a Net Profit of ₹2,823 million, with Diluted EPS at ₹41.18. The growth was attributed to robust demand for ICT products, sustained Tier-2 channel stocking, and favorable pricing. Operational highlights included new distribution partnerships with Dell Technologies and Teachmint, expansion of its distribution footprint, and strengthening its semiconductor presence. Management emphasized continued focus on expanding into new business verticals, strengthening the distribution network, and increasing focus on AI-led products and solutions for sustainable long-term growth.

  • Q4 FY26 revenue surged 51% YoY to ₹44,894 million, with PAT increasing 65% YoY to ₹868 million.
  • FY26 revenue grew to ₹158,273 million, and net profit reached ₹2,823 million.
  • Strategic partnerships with Dell and Teachmint expanded commercial and digital learning offerings.
  • Expanded distribution network and semiconductor footprint, reinforcing growth opportunities.
  • Company focused on AI-led products, new markets, and sustainability for future growth.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Rashi Peripherals Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [RSL] Rajputana Stainless: CARE Ratings issues Q4 FY26 IPO utilization report
item.description:
Rajputana Stainless Limited submitted the Monitoring Agency Report by CARE Ratings Limited for the quarter ended March 31, 2026. The report, mandated by SEBI regulations (Regulation 32(6) of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 and Regulation 41(4) of SEBI (Issue of Capital and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2018), monitors the utilization of proceeds from the company's Initial Public Offer (IPO) which aggregated to ₹178.73 crore. CARE Ratings confirmed "Deviation from the objects: Not applicable" and "Range of Deviation: Not applicable", indicating proper utilization of funds. The monitoring agency also declared no conflict of interest.

  • Rajputana Stainless submitted the Monitoring Agency Report for Q4 FY26.
  • CARE Ratings monitored the utilization of ₹178.73 crore IPO proceeds.
  • The report found no deviation from the stated objects of the IPO.
  • This confirms proper utilization of the Initial Public Offer funds.
  • The report was issued in compliance with SEBI Listing and ICDR Regulations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Rajputana Stainless Ltd | Category: Regulatory

item.title: [PVVINFRA] PVV Infra: Board Approves Capital Increase, Warrants
item.description:
The Board of Directors of PVV Infra Ltd approved an increase in authorized share capital from ₹120 Crore to ₹170 Crore, subject to shareholder approval. They also approved the issuance of up to 6.65 Crore convertible equity share warrants at ₹7.50 each on a preferential basis, aggregating up to ₹49.875 Crore, also subject to shareholder approval. Additionally, a power of attorney was granted to Mr. Shubh Gangully for signing bids related to NHAI way side amenities projects.

  • PVV Infra's authorized share capital will increase from ₹120 Crore to ₹170 Crore, pending shareholder approval.
  • Board approved issuing up to 6.65 Crore convertible equity share warrants at ₹7.50 each, raising up to ₹49.875 Crore.
  • Warrants will be issued on a preferential basis, subject to shareholder and regulatory approvals.
  • Shubh Gangully is authorized to sign bids for NHAI way side amenities projects on behalf of the company.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PVV Infra Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [HUBTOWN] Hubtown FY26: Proforma Pre-Sales at ₹4,382 Cr, Up 58% YoY
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Hubtown Ltd announced its FY26 results, reporting proforma pre-sales of ₹4,382 crore and proforma collections of ₹1,910 crore. The company's unrecognized revenue stands at ₹11,365 crore. Hubtown received NCLT approval for the amalgamation of 25 West Realty Private Limited and Saicharan Consultancy Private Limited. The company is awaiting approvals for the merger of other entities developing the 25 South and 25 Downtown projects. Hubtown is targeting pre-sales of ₹6,000 crore and cash collection of ₹3,000 crore in FY27.

  • Hubtown's FY26 proforma pre-sales reached ₹4,382 crore.
  • FY26 proforma collections amounted to ₹1,910 crore.
  • Unrecognized revenue stands at ₹11,365 crore, providing near-term cash flow visibility.
  • NCLT approved amalgamation of 25 West Realty and Saicharan Consultancy.
  • Hubtown targets ₹6,000 crore pre-sales and ₹3,000 crore collection in FY27.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: HUBTOWN LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [ALLCARGO] Allcargo Logistics Q4FY26: EBITDA up 41%, PBT up 205.4%
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Allcargo Logistics Ltd announced its consolidated financial results for the quarter ended March 31, 2026, following the merger of its domestic supply chain business. Q4FY26 focused on operational efficiencies and service levels. The company reported a 41% year-on-year EBITDA growth and a 205.4% increase in Profit Before Tax (before Exceptional items). Revenue remained stable. For the full year FY26, revenue grew by 5%, EBITDA increased by 16.5%, and PBT rose by 95.9%. The company expects growth in both Express and Consultative Logistics businesses in FY27.

  • Allcargo Logistics' Q4FY26 EBITDA grew by 41% year-on-year.
  • Q4FY26 Profit Before Tax increased by 205.4% year-on-year.
  • FY26 revenue grew by 5%, EBITDA increased by 16.5%.
  • Express and Contract Logistics registered stable revenue growth in Q4FY26.
  • Company expects growth in Express and Consultative Logistics businesses in FY27.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ALLCARGO LOGISTICS LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [IBULHSGFIN] Sammaan Capital Board Meeting on May 20, 2026
item.description:
Sammaan Capital Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 20, 2026, to consider and approve the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The board will also consider raising funds through the issuance of debt securities. The trading window remains closed until May 22, 2026.

  • Board to consider FY26 audited financial results.
  • Fundraising via debt issuance to be considered.
  • Trading window closed until May 22, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Indiabulls Housing Finance Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [HUBTOWN] Hubtown Ltd: FY26 Financial Results Approved
item.description:
Hubtown Ltd's Board of Directors approved the standalone and consolidated audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. They also appointed M/s. Pipara & Co. LLP as Internal Auditors and M/s. Shekhar Joshi & Co. as Cost Auditors for FY 2026-27. The auditor's report includes a qualified opinion due to non-provision of interest expense on certain inter-corporate deposits.

  • Standalone and Consolidated Audited Financial Results for FY26 approved.
  • Pipara & Co. LLP appointed as Internal Auditors for FY27.
  • Shekhar Joshi & Co. appointed as Cost Auditors for FY27.
  • Auditor's report includes a qualified opinion.
  • Trading window opens on May 16, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: HUBTOWN LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [BAGMANE] Bagmane Prime Office REIT: Unitholding Pattern Prior to Listing
item.description:
Bagmane Prime Office REIT disclosed its unitholding pattern one day prior to listing, as per SEBI regulations. Sponsor and Sponsor Group hold 82.81% of the units, totaling 2,81,55,34,147 units. Public Holding constitutes 17.19% with 58,44,65,853 units. Total Units Outstanding are 3,40,00,00,000.

  • Sponsor & Sponsor Group holds 82.81% of Bagmane Prime Office REIT units.
  • Public Holding accounts for 17.19% of the total units outstanding.
  • Institutions hold 10.98% of the REIT's units within the Public Holding.
  • Non-Institutions hold 6.21% of the REIT's units within the Public Holding.
  • Total units outstanding for Bagmane Prime Office REIT are 3,40,00,00,000.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Bagmane Prime Office REIT | Category: Shareholding

item.title: [SAILIFE] Sai Life Sciences: FY26 Revenue ₹21,532.26 Mn
item.description:
Sai Life Sciences Ltd's audited financial results for the year ended March 31, 2026, reveal a revenue from operations of ₹21,532.26 million, compared to ₹16,420.48 million in the previous year. The company's net profit for the year stood at ₹3,414.81 million, up from ₹1,734.62 million in FY25. The Board of Directors approved these results at a meeting held on May 14, 2026. Total assets increased from ₹31,366.63 million in FY25 to ₹36,028.16 million in FY26.

  • FY26 revenue from operations reached ₹21,532.26 million, a significant increase from ₹16,420.48 million in FY25.
  • Net profit for FY26 was ₹3,414.81 million, substantially higher than the ₹1,734.62 million reported in FY25.
  • Total expenses for FY26 amounted to ₹17,381.83 million, compared to ₹14,476.67 million in the previous year.
  • Basic earnings per share increased to ₹16.27 in FY26 from ₹9.00 in FY25.
  • The Board of Directors approved the audited financial results on May 14, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Sai Life Sciences Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [MEGASOFT] Sigma Advanced Systems Secures $11.4 Mn Export Order
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Sigma Advanced Systems has secured an export order worth USD 11.4 million (approximately INR 107 Cr) from a North American customer for 90,000 units of filled fuzes for 155 mm artillery shells. The contract is to be executed over a ten-month period, with manufacturing based in India. This order signifies the company's expansion into direct export relationships and strengthens its position in the global defense manufacturing ecosystem.

  • Sigma Advanced Systems secures USD 11.4 Mn export order for artillery shell components.
  • The order is from a North American customer and will be executed over ten months.
  • This marks a shift towards direct export relationships for the company.
  • The company anticipates potential follow-on contracts from the same customer.
  • Manufacturing will be carried out in India, adhering to defense export regulations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: MEGASOFT LTD. | Category: Business Update
